name: commands-extension
description: Auto-interface for running project commands (node, pwsh, shell) from a Webview panel

commandsExtension.configFile.description: Path to commands configuration file (relative to workspace root)

commandsExtension.uploadsFile.description: Path to server uploads configuration file (relative to workspace root). The default name ends with .local.json so it stays out of git when matched by common ignore patterns.

commandsExtension.externalApiUrl.description: Optional base URL of an external HTTP service that wants notifications from this extension. When set, the extension POSTs upload progress events to {url}/events/upload-progress and the merged command list (commands-list.json + npm scripts + .ps1) to {url}/events/commands. Leave empty to disable.

scripts.package: rm -f commands-extension-*.vsix && npm run compile && vsce package --allow-missing-repository
scripts.update: git add -A && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'pre-release changes') && npm version patch && git push && git push --tags && npm run package && (xdg-open https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/manage || open https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/manage || start https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/manage)
